programs.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "BARCODE"
programs.desc: Barcodes have radically changed global commerce, helping fuel the rise of everything from massive companies like Walmart to world powers like China. And it all started with a man daydreaming on a beach in 1949.

programs.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "FLORIDA"
programs.desc: Florida wasn’t always the Sunshine State. In the 1920s, an army of real estate boosters set out to redefine Florida from an economic backwater to a vacation destination, sparking a land boom–and bust–the likes of which America had never seen before.

programs.title: The Lightbulb Moment S1 - "MAUVE"
programs.desc: In 1856, a chemistry student accidentally created a strange substance with a rich purple hue -- the world’s first synthetic dye. In just a few years, ‘Mauve’ would take over the fashion industry and enable stunning advances in medicine.

programs.title: Strip The City S2 - "Machu Picchu"
programs.desc: Stripping away the granite, CGI reveals the quake-proof walls and hidden canals that allowed Machu Picchu to survive at 11,000 feet.

programs.title: Strip The City S2 - "Los Angeles"
programs.desc: Stripping Los Angeles to its core, CGI reveals the hidden steel and fault lines that help this earthquake-prone city survive "the Big One."

programs.title: Strip The City S2 - "New Orleans"
programs.desc: CGI peels back the Superdome and the city’s silt to reveal the massive pumps and barriers keeping New Orleans from sinking.
